message:
deps: bump tracing-subscriber 0.3.19 -> 0.3.23

Patch bumps within 0.3.x. Additive filter / formatter improvements; existing
`tracing_subscriber::fmt()` and `EnvFilter` call sites compile unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,7 +70,7 @@ tempfile = "3.27.0"
 thiserror = "2.0.18"
 toml = "1.1.2"
 tracing = "0.1.44"
-tracing-subscriber = "0.3.19"
+tracing-subscriber = "0.3.23"
 xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
 zstd = "0.13"
